projects.title: E-Commerce Mobile App
projects.description: A modern e-commerce application with category browsing, smart search, favorites, and cart management using Supabase and Riverpod.
projects.detailedDescription: A scalable e-commerce mobile application built with Flutter that delivers a smooth and interactive shopping experience. The app allows users to browse categories and sub-categories, explore products, perform real-time search with suggestions, and manage favorites and cart seamlessly. It uses Supabase as a backend for real-time database operations and Riverpod for efficient state management. The architecture follows clean separation of concerns, ensuring maintainability and scalability. The UI is designed with a modern approach, including a custom bottom navigation bar and responsive layouts. This project focuses on performance, user experience, and a production-ready structure.
features: Category and sub-category based product browsing
Shopping cart with persistent data storage
Fast data fetching using Supabase backend

projects.title: Finance Management App
projects.description: A secure and user-friendly finance management app with income, expense tracking and data visualization using Flutter.
projects.detailedDescription: A cross-platform finance management application built with Flutter that helps users track their income, expenses, and savings efficiently. The app uses Hive for offline-first local data storage, ensuring fast and secure data access without relying on internet connectivity. It provides categorized transaction management, allowing users to organize their financial activities effectively. Financial insights are visualized using FL Chart, enabling users to understand spending patterns through interactive charts. Riverpod is used for scalable and efficient state management. The app focuses on performance, simplicity, and a clean user interface to deliver a seamless financial tracking experience.
features: Interactive financial charts using FL Chart
